item.title: New Quantum Algorithm Breaks Speed Record
item.description: Researchers have discovered a quantum algorithm that solves certain optimization problems exponentially faster than any known classical method.

item.title: Mathematicians Prove New Theorem in Number Theory
item.description: A team of mathematicians has proved a long-standing conjecture about prime number distribution, with implications for cryptography.

item.title: The Joy of Why Podcast: Dark Matter Mysteries
item.description: Listen to our latest episode about dark matter research.

item.title: AI Model Achieves New Breakthrough in Protein Folding
item.description: A novel deep learning architecture can predict protein structures with unprecedented accuracy, opening doors for drug discovery.

item.title: Old Article About Geometry
item.description: An older article that should be filtered by date.
